secondaryKeywords: AI social media management white label
seo.metaTitle: White-Label Directory Listings & Social Management for Service Providers | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Launch directory listings and AI-powered social media management under your brand. Help SMBs manage profiles across Google, Facebook, Instagram, and top directories from one platform.

hero.headline: The Complete Foundation for Your Clients to Establish and Grow Their Online Presence
hero.subheadline: Most SMBs struggle to manage their online profiles, social media, and directory listings across dozens of platforms. Inconsistent information erodes search visibility, customer trust, and foot traffic.
hero.description: Hostopia's Directory Listings platform enables businesses to monitor their brand and competitors while effectively managing online profiles, SEO monitoring, and social media. It's designed to boost their digital footprint across search engines, social platforms, and directories — making businesses easily discoverable and competitive. Delivered white-label as part of the Online Marketing Center Essentials plan.

items.title: Save time managing all social media in one place
items.body: Instead of logging into Facebook, Instagram, and Google separately, SMBs manage everything from a single dashboard. Schedule posts, respond to comments, and track engagement across all platforms without the time drain of switching between apps — freeing up hours every week to focus on running their business.

image.alt: Social media management from a single dashboard

items.title: Post consistently with scheduling and automation
items.body: Consistency is key to social media success, but most SMBs can't commit to daily posting. Built-in scheduling tools let businesses plan content days or weeks in advance, with automation ensuring a steady stream of posts goes live on the right platforms at the right times — even when they're busy serving customers.

image.alt: Content scheduling and social media automation

items.title: Get powerful insights into what's working
items.body: A smart dashboard provides a full overview of reviews, mentions, and ad performance in one place. SMBs can see which posts drive the most engagement, how their listings are performing, and where their brand stands compared to competitors — turning raw data into clear direction on where to invest their time and marketing budget.

items.title: Create professional content with AI
items.body: Not every SMB owner is a copywriter or designer. The AI post generator creates and manages professional, on-brand content for Meta and Google platforms — ready to edit, customize, and publish. Businesses produce social content that looks and reads like it came from a marketing team, without the cost of hiring one.

image.alt: AI-powered content creation for social media

items.title: Stay on top of reviews with AI auto-reply
items.body: Customer reviews appear on Google, Facebook, and Instagram at all hours. AI auto-reply ensures every review gets a timely, professional response — maintaining the engagement and responsiveness that builds trust with prospective customers. SMBs protect their reputation around the clock without being tethered to notifications.

heroImage.alt: Directory Listings platform dashboard showing social media and listing management

features.heading: Listings, Social, and SEO Monitoring — One Platform Under Your Brand
features.intro: Directory Listings combines local presence management with AI-powered social media tools and SEO monitoring. You deliver a comprehensive digital foundation that SMBs actually use — and that drives recurring revenue with minimal support overhead.

cards.title: AI Auto-Reply
cards.body: Automatically respond to Facebook, Instagram, and Google reviews with AI-generated replies that maintain a professional, timely presence. SMBs stay responsive without the manual effort of monitoring and replying to every review individually.

cards.title: Smart Dashboard
cards.body: A full overview of reviews, mentions, and ad performance in one centralized view. SMBs see everything that matters to their online presence at a glance — no more piecing together data from multiple platforms.

cards.title: Top Listings Sync
cards.body: Coordinate and synchronize business listings across Google, Facebook, and Instagram seamlessly. One update flows everywhere, ensuring accurate, consistent business information across the platforms that drive the most visibility.

cards.title: AI Post Generator
cards.body: Edit and manage AI-generated content for Meta and Google platforms. SMBs produce professional social content without needing creative expertise — saving time while maintaining a consistent, active online presence.

cards.title: SEO Essentials
cards.body: Monitor key SEO performance with integrated scoring and feedback. SMBs get a clear picture of their search visibility health and actionable recommendations to improve rankings — building awareness of SEO value that opens the door to premium plans.

partnerAdvantage.heading: High Value, Low Cost — The Perfect Foundation Product
partnerAdvantage.intro: Directory Listings is your highest-attach digital product. It bundles naturally with everything else you sell, costs little to support, and creates the engagement that keeps customers in your ecosystem.

items.title: High value, comprehensive feature set at low cost
items.body: AI-powered social management, directory sync, review auto-reply, and SEO monitoring in a single plan. Deliver premium marketing capabilities that justify a recurring subscription — with margins that make the unit economics work at any scale.

items.title: Reduce churn with engaging essential tools
items.body: When SMBs manage their social media, reviews, and listings through your platform daily, they become deeply embedded in your ecosystem. That regular usage creates the kind of stickiness that pure connectivity products can't match.

items.title: Bundle opportunity with hosting and website builder
items.body: Every website customer needs listings, social media management, and SEO. Bundle Directory Listings with your hosting and website builder to create higher-ARPU packages that deliver more value and are harder for competitors to unbundle.

items.title: Foundation for upselling to advanced features
items.body: The Essentials plan is the natural stepping stone to reputation management, full SEO, advertising, and the complete marketing suite. Customers who see results from basic tools become buyers of advanced ones.

lifecycleFit.heading: The Foundation of Local Discoverability
lifecycleFit.intro: Accurate listings and active social profiles are prerequisites for effective SEO and reputation management. Directory Listings is the base layer of your 'Get Found' stack — the product that makes everything else work harder.

steps.title: Build a Brand
steps.body: Domains, logo, and professional email establish the SMB identity.

steps.title: Get Online
steps.body: Websites and hosting launch their digital presence.

steps.title: Get Found
steps.body: Directory Listings ensures accurate profiles everywhere, with AI-powered social management and SEO monitoring driving visibility.

steps.title: Grow
steps.body: Ecommerce, email marketing, and advanced advertising drive revenue growth.

lifecycleFit.positioning: Position Directory Listings as the always-on visibility and social management product that makes SEO and reputation management work harder — a natural bundle with websites, hosting, and your full marketing portfolio.

cta.headline: Ready to Turn Listings and Social Management into Recurring Revenue?
cta.body: Connect with Hostopia to launch Directory Listings under your brand. Bundle it with your web portfolio and give SMBs the complete foundation they need to manage their online presence — from directory accuracy to AI-powered social media.
